data.title: Telegram Enhances Crypto Wallet With Trading And Earnings Features
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Telegram has introduced trading and earnings functionalities to its self-custody crypto wallet. This update allows users to buy, sell, or hold cryptocurrencies without needing on-chain deposits, aiming to attract new users.

data.title: Hyperliquid 50x leverage whale switched to GMX, opened a short position of 45.17 million USD ETH, and the liquidation price was 1982 USD
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa, the 50x leveraged whale that had previously made a profit on Hyperliquid has moved to GMX and opened a large ETH short order.
Monitoring data shows that the whale recharged 4.09 million USDC to GMX as margin 10 minutes ago, and then opened ETH short orders with 17.6x and 18.06x leverage respectively, with a total position size of 45.17 million US dollars, an opening price of 1,885 US dollars, and a liquidation price of 1,982 US dollars.

data.title: Gate.io pre-market OTC trading is now available Abstract(ABS)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the official announcement, Gate.io's pre-market OTC trading was officially launched on Abstract (ABS) at 17:00 (UTC+8) on March 13, 2025.

data.title: Russian Central Bank Proposes Three-Year Cryptocurrency Trading Pilot
data.description: According to Odaily, the Russian Central Bank has proposed a three-year pilot program for cryptocurrency trading, targeting high-net-worth investors who meet specific asset or income thresholds. The proposal outlines that eligible participants must possess at least $11.5 million in assets or have an annual income of $50 million. This pilot program requires government approval and, if sanctioned, could represent a significant move towards advancing the cryptocurrency market in Russia.

data.title: PoPP completes $6 million financing, bringing total financing to $12 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Decentralized user agreement platform PoPP announced the completion of the last round of financing of US$6 million before TGE, with a total financing amount of US$12 million. Investors in this round include Oasis Labs, X-Labs, Becker Ventures, InnoAlpha, Blocklike Ventures, etc.
PoPP provides users with dynamic on-chain identity tags, accurately matches dApps, and provides developers with accurate audience positioning with privacy protection by analyzing on-chain behaviors.
After the financing is completed, PoPP will promote PoPP AI-Profile, build a Web3 user ecosystem, optimize the smart matching experience, and expand more application scenarios.

data.title: Crypto Founders Thwart North Korean Hackers Using Fake Zoom Calls
data.description:
According to PANews, several cryptocurrency project founders have recently reported successfully preventing attempts by suspected North Korean hackers to steal sensitive data through fake Zoom calls. On March 11, Nick Bax, a member of the white-hat hacker group Security Alliance, warned on the X platform that North Korean scammers have used this method to steal millions of dollars from victims. Bax explained that the scammers typically lure targets with the promise of meetings or collaborations. Once the call begins, they send a message pretending there is an audio issue while playing a dull video of a venture capitalist. They then provide a fake new call link, claiming a patch is needed to fix the audio/video. This tactic exploits people's eagerness to meet important figures and resolve audio issues, leading them to lower their guard. Installing the patch results in falling victim to the scam.

Giulio Xiloyonnis, co-founder of blockchain game Mon Protocol, revealed that scammers attempted to deceive him and his marketing director through a collaboration meeting. Fortunately, he realized at the last moment that the provided Zoom link was a scam, falsely claiming audio issues to induce malware installation. David Zhang, co-founder of U.S. venture-backed stablecoin Stably, was also targeted. Scammers used his Google Meet link but fabricated an internal meeting excuse to get him to join. Zhang noted that the site appeared to be a normal Zoom call, but he was unsure of its behavior on a desktop as he answered on a tablet. Melbin Thomas, founder of the Web3 project decentralized AI platform Devdock AI, also encountered the scam. Although he did not enter a password during installation, he disconnected his laptop and reset it to factory settings, transferring files to a hard drive without reconnecting, leaving uncertainty about potential infection.

Additionally, earlier today, blockchain security firm CertiK reported that following a series of high-profile hacking incidents, the Lazarus Group has been using mixers to move crypto assets. They detected the deposit of 400 Ethereum, valued at approximately $750,000, into the Tornado Cash mixing service.

data.title: Russia's central bank proposes a three-year crypto trading pilot, limited to investors with $11.5 million in assets or $50 million in annual income
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News The Russian Central Bank has proposed launching a three-year cryptocurrency trading pilot program that is only open to high-net-worth investors who meet certain asset or income thresholds.
According to the proposal, investors who meet the following conditions can participate in the pilot:
Hold at least $11.5 million in assets, or
Annual income reaches $50 million
The pilot still needs to be approved by the government. If passed, it may become an important step for Russia to promote the development of the crypto market.
(Cointelegraph)

data.title: Crypto.com Partners with UAE Tech Firm Tawasal Al Khaleej
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Crypto.com has established an exclusive cryptocurrency partnership with Tawasal Al Khaleej, the leading social and communication application developer in the UAE, to expand its market layout in the UAE.
Tawasal SuperApp, an application developed by Tawasal Al Khaleej, is a multi-functional social and communication platform that provides instant messaging, voice and video calls, news, payment and other services. Through this cooperation, Crypto.com will provide cryptocurrency trading and payment services to Tawasal users, further enriching its application ecosystem.
Crypto.com CEO Kris Marszalek said that this cooperation marks the company's important strategic layout in the Middle East, aiming to provide UAE users with safe and reliable cryptocurrency services. At the same time, Saeed Alblooshi, CEO of Tawasal Al Khaleej, also said that the cooperation with Crypto.com will bring users more diversified financial service options to meet their growing demand for digital assets.
(FinanceFeeds)
